commit.message:
Address PR comments

1. Switched to using `FileId` instead of `FileId128` for computing
   `fileIndex{Low|High}` to maintain consistency with
   `GetFileInformationByHandle()`, which populates a 64-bit ID instead
   of a 128-bit ID.

2. Added a new JNI function (`supportsGetFileInformationByName()`) to
   check whether the `GetFileInformationByName()` function is available
   to use, thus avoiding an exception being thrown and caught on older
   platforms where the function is unavailable every time
   `WindowsFileAttributes.get()` is called.
